task_completion.description: Verify that the patient 'Jayson Fadel' is selected and visible in the OpenEMR interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Jayson Fadel' in the patient header, dashboard, or active patient display area.

task_completion.description: Verify that a clinical encounter form (e.g., SOAP Note, Clinical Note, New Encounter) is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for form headers like 'New Encounter', 'SOAP', 'Clinical', or input fields labeled for subjective/history documentation.

task_completion.description: Verify that text has been entered into the History of Present Illness (HPI) or Subjective section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for typed text in a text area labeled 'HPI', 'Subjective', 'Description', or similar.

task_completion.description: Verify the documented HPI contains at least 4 specific clinical elements from the scenario (Location, Quality, Severity, Duration, Context, Modifying Factors, Associated Signs).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the entered text. Confirm presence of at least 4 of the following details: 'Lumbar'/'Lower back', 'Dull'/'Sharp', '6/10', '5 days', 'Lifting boxes'/'Moving', 'Worse with bending'/'Better with rest/ibuprofen', 'No leg pain'/'No numbness'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the encounter or note has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save' button being clicked, a 'Saved' success message/toast, or the note appearing in a read-only list of past encounters.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the OpenEMR web interface and not terminal/database commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenEMR web UI, not a terminal or code editor executing SQL/curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the text entry appears to be a clinical note and not a direct copy-paste of the task instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text should read like a patient history (e.g., 'Patient presents with...') rather than instructions (e.g., 'Your task: Document...').

integrity.description: Verify that the agent is interacting with the OpenEMR application directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The active window should be the web browser displaying OpenEMR.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Jayson Fadel (DOB: 1992-06-30). The HPI documentation must include at least 4 of these facts: Location (Lumbar/Lower back), Quality (Dull/Sharp), Severity (6/10), Duration (5 days), Context (Lifting boxes), Modifying Factors (Relieved by rest/ibuprofen, worse with bending), Associated Signs (No leg pain/numbness).
